leadText: Bullet Punch (Japanese: バレットパンチ Bullet Punch) is a damage-dealing Steel-type move introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Bullet Punch inflicts damage. It has a priority of +1, so is used before all moves that do not have increased priority. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Bullet Punch's PP has been reduced to 20. It also increases the user's action speed. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Physical PP 20 Agile Strong Power 40 30 50 Accuracy 100% 100% 100% Action speed modifier Self -4 -4 +2 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect ? ? ? ? ? ? Increases the user's action speed Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Like all other moves that previously possessed priority, Bullet Punch causes the user to dash forward to make damaging contact with the target (although terrain may interfere with doing so). During the dash, the user is intangible and will ignore projectiles and hazards that they pass through. Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Physical Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 30 36 Cooldown 3s Move wind-up time 0 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect — — — None

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR The user strikes with a tough punch as fast as a bullet. This move always goes first. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP S V The user strikes the target with tough punches as fast as bullets. This move always goes first. LA The user strikes the target with tough punches as fast as bullets. This also raises the user’s action speed. ZA The user attacks with a flurry of tough punches as fast as bullets.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Inflicts damage on a target up to 2 tiles away. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる ２マスまで とどく Conq. The user strikes the target with tough punches as fast as bullets. MD GtI UNUSED S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It reaches up to 2 tiles away.
